text:
先輩、こんにちは。
いつもありがとうございます。

惑星ハルコタンは、今までの惑星と
全くちがう文化の惑星ですね。
独自の発展を遂げてて、素敵です。

でも、そこにもダーカーや
ブーストエネミーは出現する……
放ってはおけないです。
Hello. Thanks for all your help.

The culture on Harukotan is quite different from
that of other planets, isn't it? It's wonderful
that they've developed in such unique ways.

However, Falspawn and Berserk Enemies have
appeared there as well. We simply cannot leave
them be.

Heck yeah! I'm looking forward to working with
you again, teach!
